whatIs.question: 什么是Supacamp？
whatIs.answer: 一个孩子们组队、完成真实挑战、用AI将视频变成精彩短片的平台。

isSafe.question: 对我的孩子安全吗？
isSafe.answer: 完全安全。COPPA合规，需家长同意，无私信，无公开个人资料，所有视频经AI审核。

howAiWorks.question: AI视频转换如何工作？
howAiWorks.answer: AI将视频转换为风格化短片——漫画风、水彩风或剪纸动画风。

cost.question: 免费吗？
cost.answer: Supacamp提供免费版本，可使用基本挑战和视频转换功能。

age.question: 适合什么年龄？
age.answer: 适合6-17岁儿童。13岁以下需要家长验证同意。

cta.title: 准备好开始冒险了吗？
cta.subtitle: 今天就创建团队，把现实世界变成你的游乐场。

about.title: About Supacamp
about.missionText: We believe every kid deserves an adventure. Supacamp exists to get children off screens and into the real world — running, creating, exploring, and laughing with their friends.
about.storyText: Supacamp was born from a simple observation: kids love video games because of challenges, teamwork, and rewards. What if we brought those same mechanics to the real world? What if completing a backyard obstacle course felt as epic as beating a video game boss? That idea became Supacamp — a platform where real-world adventures get the AI-powered cinematic treatment they deserve.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: Every feature we build starts with the question: is this safe for kids? COPPA compliance, content moderation, and parental controls are not afterthoughts — they are the foundation.

creativity.title: Creativity Unleashed
creativity.description: We use AI not to replace creativity but to amplify it. When a kid films a silly dance challenge, our AI transforms it into something they never imagined possible.

teamwork.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
teamwork.description: Everything on Supacamp is built around teams. We believe kids learn best when they collaborate, communicate, and celebrate together.

outdoor.title: The Great Outdoors
outdoor.description: Our challenges are designed to get kids moving — in parks, backyards, trails, and neighborhoods. The real world is the ultimate playground.

featuresIndex.title: Everything Your Team Needs
featuresIndex.subtitle: Supacamp is packed with features designed to make outdoor adventures epic, safe, and unforgettable.

step2.description: Set screen time limits, approve team invitations, and manage consent.

step3.title: Monitor Activity
step3.description: View your child's challenges, videos, and team interactions anytime.

step1.title: Complete Challenges
step1.description: Every challenge your team finishes can unlock sticker badges.

step2.description: Build your collection with rare, epic, and legendary sticker badges.

q1.question: What AI styles are available?
q1.answer: We offer comic book, watercolor, pixel art, paper craft, neon glow, and more. New styles are added regularly.

q2.question: How long does transformation take?
q2.answer: Most videos are transformed within 2-5 minutes depending on length and style.

q3.question: Is the original video kept private?
q3.answer: Yes. The original video is never shared publicly. Only the AI-transformed version is visible to others, and only after moderation.

q1.question: How many people can be on a team?
q1.answer: Teams can have 2-8 members. The ideal team size is 3-5 for most challenges.

q2.question: Can I be on multiple teams?
q2.answer: Currently, each player can belong to one team at a time.

q3.question: Who is the team captain?
q3.answer: The person who creates the team is the captain. Captains can manage team settings and approve new members.

q1.question: Who creates the challenges?
q1.answer: All challenges are created and reviewed by the Supacamp team to ensure they are fun, safe, and age-appropriate.

q2.question: Are challenges safe?
q2.answer: Absolutely. Every challenge includes safety notes and is reviewed by our team. Challenges are designed for outdoor fun, not dangerous stunts.

q3.question: How many challenges are there?
q3.answer: We launch with dozens of challenges across six categories, with new challenges added every week.

q1.question: How are points calculated?
q1.answer: Points are awarded based on challenge difficulty, creativity, and completion. Bonus points are given for team vs team victories.

q2.question: Are leaderboards fair?
q2.answer: Yes. We have separate leaderboards by age group and region to keep competition fair and fun.

q3.question: How often do leaderboards reset?
q3.answer: Weekly leaderboards reset every Monday. Monthly leaderboards reset on the first of each month. The global leaderboard is cumulative.

q1.question: Is Supacamp COPPA compliant?
q1.answer: Yes. We are fully COPPA compliant. Children under 13 require verified parental consent before they can create an account.

q2.question: How does content moderation work?
q2.answer: Every video goes through AI-powered content moderation before it becomes visible. Videos flagged by AI are reviewed by human moderators.

q3.question: Can strangers contact my child?
q3.answer: No. There is no direct messaging on Supacamp. Team communication happens only within approved teams, and there are no public profiles.

q1.question: Who can see videos in the gallery?
q1.answer: Only AI-transformed, moderated videos appear in the gallery. Original footage is never shown publicly.

q2.question: Can I opt out of the gallery?
q2.answer: Yes. Parents can choose to keep all of their child's videos private through parental controls.

q3.question: How are featured videos selected?
q3.answer: Featured videos are selected based on creativity, challenge difficulty, and community engagement.

q1.question: How are matchups made?
q1.answer: Teams can challenge any other team, or use the auto-match feature to find a team of similar skill level.

q2.question: What happens if a team doesn't respond?
q2.answer: Challenges expire after 48 hours if the other team doesn't accept.

q3.question: How does voting work?
q3.answer: Community members watch both videos and vote. Voting is anonymous and each person gets one vote per matchup.

q1.question: What can parents control?
q1.answer: Parents can set screen time limits, approve or block team invitations, manage video visibility, and view all activity.

q2.question: Is the parent PIN secure?
q2.answer: Yes. The parent PIN is encrypted and required for all changes to safety and privacy settings.

q3.question: Can parents delete content?
q3.answer: Yes. Parents can delete any of their child's videos or remove them from teams at any time.

q1.question: What kinds of badges are there?
q1.answer: Badges come in four rarities: common, rare, epic, and legendary. Each category of challenges has unique badge designs.

q2.question: Can badges be traded?
q2.answer: Not currently. Badges are personal achievements tied to your team's accomplishments.

q3.question: Are there physical rewards?
q3.answer: Currently all rewards are digital sticker badges. Physical reward options may be explored in the future.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Supacamp, protecting the privacy of children is our highest priority. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information.
privacy.coppaTitle: COPPA Compliance (Children's Online Privacy Protection Act)
privacy.coppaText1: Supacamp is fully compliant with COPPA. We do not collect personal information from children under 13 without verified parental consent.
privacy.coppaText2: Parents or guardians must provide verifiable consent before a child under 13 can create an account. Parents can review, delete, or refuse further collection of their child's information at any time.
privacy.coppaText3: We collect only the minimum information necessary to provide the service: a display name (not the child's real name), an avatar selection, challenge participation data, and uploaded video content.
privacy.gdprText1: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), we process personal data in accordance with the GDPR.
privacy.gdprText2: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and port your data. You may also object to processing at any time.
privacy.gdprText3: We process data based on consent (for children's accounts, parental consent) and legitimate interest (for platform safety and moderation).
privacy.gdprText4: To exercise any of your rights, contact us at privacy@supacamp.com.
privacy.dataCollectionText: Display names, avatar selections, team membership, challenge participation records, uploaded videos, and basic usage analytics. We do not collect real names, addresses, phone numbers, or precise location data from children.
privacy.dataSecurityText: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Videos are stored securely and are only accessible after AI moderation review. We conduct regular security audits.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, email us at privacy@supacamp.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Supacamp. By using our platform, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.
terms.eligibilityText: Supacamp is designed for children aged 6-17. Children under 13 must have verified parental consent to create an account. Parents or guardians are responsible for their child's use of the platform.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. Do not share your password. Parents can manage their child's account through the parental controls dashboard.
terms.contentText1: By uploading videos to Supacamp, you grant us a license to process, transform (via AI), moderate, and display the transformed content on the platform.
terms.contentText2: Original videos are stored securely and never displayed publicly. Only AI-transformed versions are shown, and only after passing content moderation.
terms.contentText3: You must not upload content that is violent, inappropriate, or violates any laws. Content that violates our guidelines will be removed.
terms.safetyText1: All challenges on Supacamp are designed to be safe and fun. Users must follow the safety guidelines provided with each challenge.
terms.safetyText2: Supacamp is not responsible for injuries that occur during challenge completion. Parental supervision is recommended for younger children.
terms.safetyText3: Harassment, bullying, or any form of abuse is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate account termination.
terms.ipText: Supacamp, its logo, design, and AI transformation technology are proprietary. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our platform or its content without permission.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Parents may delete their child's account at any time through parental controls.
terms.disclaimerText: Supacamp is provided as-is. While we strive for reliability, we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We are not liable for any damages arising from use of the platform.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@supacamp.com.
